Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Compelling Non-Party Witness Beau Blackwell'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition Subpoena And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant China Basin Ballpark's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. The deponent, Beau Blackwell, is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule his continued deposition. The deposition shall be completed by October 20, 2006. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order unless the witness appears for deposition on or before October 20, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant China Basin Ballpark's motion to compel attendance at deposition of non-party witness Benjamin Grey is granted. No opposition has been filed. The witness is ordered to contact counsel for defendant immediately to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed on or before August 28, 2006. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $395 for costs incurred as a result of the non-appearance are to be paid on or before September 7, 2006. In addition, the witness is ordered to pay $300 in attorneys' fees. However, if the witness complies with the order of the Court and appears for deposition, he need not pay the $300. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
